sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (value String) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT value, toDecimal32OrZero(value, 2) AS converted_value FROM test_decimal;
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = toString(toDecimal32OrZero(value, 3)) WHERE value != 'Inf';
SELECT value, toDecimal32OrZero(toString(value), 4) AS safe_converted FROM test_decimal WHERE value NOT LIKE 'NaN';
